sentences.target: Ich suche die Nadel im Nähkorb.

translations.de: Ich suche die Nadel im Nähkorb.
translations.en: I’m looking for the needle in the sewing basket.
translations.es: Estoy buscando la aguja en el costurero.
translations.fr: Je cherche l'aiguille dans le panier à couture.
translations.it: Sto cercando l'ago nel cesto da cucito.
translations.ru: Я ищу иголку в швейной корзине.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a agulha na cesta de costura.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המחט בסל התפירה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm cây kim trong giỏ khâu.
translations.ar: أبحث عن الإبرة في سلة الخياطة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de naald in de naaimand.
translations.uk: Я шукаю голку в швейному кошику.
translations.hi: मैं सिलाई की टोकरी में सुई ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Szukam igły w koszyku do szycia.
translations.el: Ψάχνω τη βελόνα στο καλάθι ραπτικής.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter nålen i syskrinet.
translations.id: Saya mencari jarum di keranjang jahit.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter nålen i syskrinet.
translations.ro: Caut acul în coșul de cusut.
translations.cs: Hledám jehlu v košíku na šití.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter nålen i sykurven.
translations.ja: 裁縫かごの中の針を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object ('die Nadel') and a locative PP ('im Nähkorb').
Definite article marking feminine singular accusative; agrees with 'Nadel' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'suche'.
Preposition 'in' contracted with the dative article 'dem' (in+dem→im); governs dative in a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Nadel fällt dauernd vom Tisch.

translations.de: Die Nadel fällt dauernd vom Tisch.
translations.en: The needle keeps falling off the table.
translations.es: La aguja no deja de caerse de la mesa.
translations.fr: L'aiguille n'arrête pas de tomber de la table.
translations.it: L'ago continua a cadere dal tavolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 针老是从桌子上掉下去。
translations.ru: Иголка всё время падает со стола.
translations.pt: A agulha não para de cair da mesa.
translations.vi: Cây kim cứ rơi xuống khỏi bàn.
translations.ar: الإبرة تقع من الطاولة طوال الوقت.
translations.nl: De naald valt steeds van de tafel.
translations.hu: A tű állandóan leesik az asztalról.
translations.hi: सुई बार-बार मेज़ से गिर जाती है.
translations.el: Η βελόνα πέφτει συνέχεια από το τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Nålen faller hele tiden av bordet.
translations.id: Jarum terus saja jatuh dari meja.
translations.sv: Nålen ramlar hela tiden av bordet.
translations.ro: Acul cade mereu de pe masă.
translations.da: Nålen falder hele tiden ned fra bordet.
translations.ja: 針がいつも机から落ちてしまう。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking feminine singular nominative; agrees with the subject 'Nadel'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Die Nadel' as subject.
Adverb modifying the verb 'fällt' to express frequency/continuity.
Preposition 'von' contracted with dative article 'dem' (von+dem→vom); governs dative in a source/ablative PP.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of 'vom' indicating the source ('from the table').

sentences.target: Du hältst die Nadel bitte kurz.

translations.de: Du hältst die Nadel bitte kurz.
translations.en: Please hold the needle for a moment.
translations.es: Sujeta la aguja un momento, por favor.
translations.fr: Tiens l'aiguille un instant, s'il te plaît.
translations.it: Tieni l'ago un attimo, per favore.
translations.pt: Segura a agulha um instante, por favor.
translations.tr: İğneyi bir an tutar mısın lütfen?
translations.vi: Làm ơn cầm kim giúp mình một lát.
translations.nl: Wil je de naald even vasthouden alsjeblieft.
translations.hu: Tartsd meg a tűt egy pillanatra, kérlek.
translations.hi: कृपया सुई थोड़ी देर के लिए पकड़ लो.
translations.el: Κράτα τη βελόνα για λίγο, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Kan du holde nålen et øyeblikk, vær så snill.
translations.sv: Kan du hålla i nålen en stund, tack.
translations.da: Hold lige nålen et øjeblik, tak.
translations.ja: 針をちょっとの間持ってください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite transitive verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects a direct object and allows a predicative complement.
Definite article marking feminine singular accusative; agrees with 'Nadel' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular functioning as the direct object of 'hältst'.
Politeness particle/discourse marker; does not affect argument structure but softens the imperative-like request.
Predicative adjective functioning as an object complement with 'etw. kurz halten' (resultative meaning: keep the needle short/briefly).

sentences.target: Sie hat Angst vor der Nadel.

translations.de: Sie hat Angst vor der Nadel.
translations.en: She is afraid of the needle.
translations.es: Ella tiene miedo a las agujas.
translations.hi: उसे इंजेक्शन से डर लगता है.
translations.ja: 彼女は注射が怖いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject (here understood as 'she').
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; used as a light verb with the abstract noun 'Angst' to form the predicate 'hat Angst'.
Abstract noun, feminine; accusative singular as the internal complement of the light-verb construction 'hat Angst'.
Preposition governing dative; forms a complement with 'Angst' to indicate the object of fear ('Angst vor ...').
Definite article, feminine singular dative; agrees with 'Nadel' as the object of the preposition 'vor'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'vor' ('vor der Nadel').

jp: Ich suche die Nadel im Nähkorb.
Die Nadel fällt dauernd vom Tisch.
Du hältst die Nadel bitte kurz.
Sie hat Angst vor der Nadel.
de: Ich suche die Nadel im Nähkorb.
Die Nadel fällt dauernd vom Tisch.
Du hältst die Nadel bitte kurz.
Sie hat Angst vor der Nadel.
en: I’m looking for the needle in the sewing basket.
The needle keeps falling off the table.
Please hold the needle for a moment.
She is afraid of the needle.
